column1: Juan Soto stands out as the top pick, delivering hits in over 84% of games and drawing a favorable matchup with a platoon edge against Tomoyuki Sugano in a hitter-friendly park. Yandy Diaz also offers strong reliability atop the Rays’ lineup, benefiting from a home setting and consistent contact skills. Xavier Edwards and Bo Bichette are viable alternatives, but Soto’s blend of consistency and advantageous conditions makes him the clear, high-confidence play today.
